title: elatostema scabrum
intro: Elatostema scabrum, also known as Scaber's Polynesian Violet, is a species of flowering plant in the nettle family Urticaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fever. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, gout, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Elatostema scabrum can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
